sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
2. the rest of any number or class under consideration
3. with a certain distinction and contrast, the rest, who are not of a specific class or number
4. the rest of the things that remain
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Masculine plural of a derivative of G3007; remaining ones: - other, which remain, remnant, residue, rest.
